name: Make-a-Mix Taco Seasoning
recipeInstructions:
1. For one envelope (about 2 tablespoons), combine all ingredients and store in an airtight container or in a 6-inch square of aluminum foil, folded tightly. Use within 6 months.
2. To use: Brown 1 pound of ground beef and drain the grease.
3. Add 1/2 cup water and the Taco Seasoning Mix to the beef.
4. Reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Makes enough filling for 8 to 10 tacos.
